title: Rule-UI-View
description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega Constellation view rule (Rule-UI-View). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed fields are omitted. All three surfaces (pyContent, pxViewMetadata, pxContextMetadata) must be sent together in a single update-rule call whenever the field layout changes.

pyRuleName.description: Internal name of the view (no spaces; commonly PascalCase, underscores also used). Well-known names: 'pyEdit' for edit action, 'pyReview' for case details, custom names for step forms.

pyLabel.description: Human-readable display label shown in the UI (e.g., 'Edit', 'Details', 'Collect Documentation').

pyClassName.description: The Pega class this view belongs to (e.g., 'MyOrg-MyApp-Work-Case').

pyRuleSet.description: Rule set the view is saved to.

pyTemplateName.description: Constellation DX template used to render this view. Most form/step/action views use 'DefaultForm'. Known templates: DefaultForm, OneColumn, TwoColumn, Confirmation, ListView, SimpleTable, DataReference, OneColumnTab, CaseView, CaseSummary, CasePreview, Details, DetailsSubTabs, DetailsTwoColumn, DetailsThreeColumn, SelfServiceCaseView, DashboardPage, TwoColumnDashboard, ListPage, ObjectPage, BannerPage, OneColumnPage, TabbedPage, WideNarrowPage, CategorySubPage, DynamicDashboard, InlineDashboardPage, MobileListView, MobileDetailsPage, DuplicateCases, ExploreDataPage, Glimpse, DynamicTabs, SubTabs, EmailManagerContainer, EmailCaseViewContainer, CoexistencePageTemplate.

pxViewType.description: High-level view category for page-level views. Set 'details' for pyReview-style full-page case detail views. Set 'summary' for pyCaseSummary case summary views. Set 'embeddedform' for sub-form views embedded inside assignments/steps. Omit entirely for step forms and action views (pyEdit, step assignment forms).

pyDescription.description: Developer-facing description of the view's purpose.

pyDefaultHeading.description: Default heading text displayed above the view.

pyColumnCount.description: Column count for the view layout. Default '2' for DefaultForm views. Maps to pxViewMetadata.config.NumCols.

pyInheritParentLayout.description: Whether to inherit layout from parent view. Default false. Maps to pxViewMetadata.config.inheritParentLayout.

pyInstructionsOption.description: How instructions are sourced: 'casestep' = from the flow step, 'overridden' = from the pyInstructions paragraph rule, 'none' = no instructions.

pyInstructionsType.description: 'text' = static text content. 'paragraph' = content sourced from a Paragraph rule library.

pyInstructions.description: Name of the Paragraph rule that provides instruction text for this view. Only used when pyInstructionsOption = 'overridden'.

pyCircumstanceType.description: Type of circumstancing — 'PROPERTY' means this variant is selected based on a property value.

pyCircumstanceProp.description: Property path used for circumstance-based variant selection (e.g., '.pxActiveChannelFromAPI').

pyCircumstanceVal.description: Property value that selects this view variant (e.g., 'Mobile').

pyContent.description: Primary authored field defining the view's field layout. For DefaultForm-style views, contains ContentRegion objects. For DataReference views, may contain a mix of field entries and Regions at the top level. For page views, Regions contain widget entries. This is the source of truth — always update alongside pxViewMetadata and pxContextMetadata in the same call.

anyOf.description: Non-region top-level entry (field, widget, or other content node).

pxViewMetadata.description: Constellation component tree for this view — a JSON-stringified object. MUST be a JSON string (use JSON.stringify), not an object. The Pega API rejects objects with 'Something went wrong with converting the json to a clipboard page'. Must be updated explicitly alongside pyContent when using the Agentic Authoring API (not auto-regenerated). See $defs/ViewMetadata for the internal structure. localeReference follows the pattern '@LR CLASSNAME!VIEW!RULENAME' with all segments uppercased and dots replaced by hyphens.

pxContextMetadata.description: View dependency summary — a JSON-stringified object. MUST be a JSON string (use JSON.stringify), not an object. The Pega API rejects objects with 'Something went wrong with converting the json to a clipboard page'. Must be updated explicitly alongside pyContent when using the Agentic Authoring API. Lists all properties, embedded views, and associated datasources referenced by this view. See $defs/ContextMetadata for the internal structure.

pyPagesAndClasses.description: Named pages used by this view, with their classes.

pyListOfViewPrivileges.description: Privilege rules required to access this view (usually empty).

ContentRegion.description: A layout region within the view (Pega-UI-Content-Region). Typically one region named 'Fields' containing all field entries.

pyPromptClass.description: Pega class context for this region (same as the view's pyClassName).

pyContent.description: Field entries inside this region. Each entry is one of the known field types.

anyOf.description: Non-field region entry (widget or other content node).

GroupComponent.description: A Group container within a Region (Pega-UI-Content-Group). Wraps fields with an optional heading, collapsibility, and instructions. Nests inside a ContentRegion's pyContent.

pyHeadingOption.description: 'text' = static text heading, 'paragraph' = heading sourced from a Paragraph rule.

pyShowHeading.description: Whether to display the group heading.

pyCollapsible.description: Whether the group can be collapsed by the user.

pyExpanded.description: Initial expanded state when collapsible is true.

pyVisibilityOption.description: 'always' = always visible, 'when' = conditional via When rule, 'expression' = conditional via expression.

pyInstructionsOption.description: Group instructions: 'none' = no instructions, 'show' = display instructions.

pyInstructions.description: Instruction text or instruction source reference.

pyPromptClass.description: Pega class context (same as the view's pyClassName).

pyContent.description: Field entries nested inside this group.

FieldEntryBase.description: Common fields shared by all field entry types in pyContent.

pyFieldReference.description: Property name WITHOUT dot prefix (e.g., 'StartDate', not '.StartDate').

pyValueWithoutAnnotation.description: Property reference without @P annotation — same as pyValue.

pyLabel.description: Label reference with dot prefix (e.g., '.StartDate'). The @FL annotation is added server-side at runtime.

pyLabelOption.description: 'field' = use the property rule's pyLabel via @FL (most common). 'text' = use pyLabel value directly. 'paragraph' = use a Paragraph rule for the label.

pyPromptClass.description: Pega class context for property resolution (same as the view's pyClassName).

pyDisplayLabel.description: Human-readable type label for Dev Studio UI — cosmetic only, has no effect on rendering. Server-generated on save; does not need to be set on CREATE/UPDATE.

pyRequiredOption.description: Makes the field required. 'always' = unconditionally required (pair with 'required: true' in pxViewMetadata config). 'when' = required when a When rule evaluates to true. 'expression' = required when an expression evaluates to true.

pyDisabledOption.description: Disabled condition: 'never', 'always', or a When rule name.

pyReadOnlyOption.description: Read-only condition: 'auto', 'always', or a When rule name.

pyVisibilityOption.description: Visibility condition: 'always', 'never', or a When rule name.

TextInputField.description: Single-line text input field (TextInput component). Also used for Checkbox (Boolean) fields — see CheckboxField.

TextAreaField.description: Multi-line text area field (TextArea component) for paragraph-length text.

CheckboxField.description: Boolean / checkbox field. IMPORTANT: Use pxObjClass 'Pega-UI-Content-Field-Text' (NOT 'Pega-UI-Content-Field-Boolean' or 'Pega-UI-Content-Field-Checkbox') — Boolean does not HTTP 500 on 26.1 but produces a broken rule (value binding dropped, $properties empty). Note: pyCaptionOption/pyCaptionText are declared on Pega-UI-Content-Field-Boolean in the class hierarchy, but the Agentic Authoring API requires Pega-UI-Content-Field-Text as pxObjClass and accepts these properties via the JSON content blob. The pxViewMetadata entry uses type 'Checkbox' with caption fields. Do NOT include pyLabel — Checkbox fields use pyCaptionText/pyCaptionOption for inline captions instead.

pyCaptionText.description: Caption property reference with dot prefix (e.g., '.ManagerApprovalStatus').

pyCaptionOption.description: 'field' = use the property rule's pyLabel via @FL. 'text' = use pyCaptionText value directly. 'paragraph' = source from a Paragraph rule library.

pyHideLabel.description: True to hide the outer row label (caption is shown inline instead).

pxObjClass.description: DateTime field class — always hyphenated 'Pega-UI-Content-Field-Date-Time'. The non-hyphenated form 'Pega-UI-Content-Field-DateTime' is not accepted by the server.

CurrencyField.description: Currency field (Currency component). Uses Pega-UI-Content-Field-Decimal-Currency with a nested pyNumberDisplay object for ISO code configuration.

pyAllowDecimals.description: Allow decimal places. String boolean: 'true' or 'false'.

pyAlwaysShowISO.description: Always display the ISO currency code inline. String boolean: 'true' or 'false'.

pyCurrencyISOCode.description: Property reference for the ISO code (e.g., '.Currency'). Present only when pyCurrencyISOCodeType is 'propertyRef'.

pyCurrencyISOCodeType.description: 'propertyRef' = ISO code from a property reference. 'constant' = system default ISO code.

RadioButtonsField.description: Radio buttons field (RadioButtons component). Same pxObjClass as Dropdown (Pega-UI-Content-Field-Picklist) but renders as radio buttons. Requires $associated wiring in pxContextMetadata.

pyJsonConfig.description: JSON-encoded string: '{"datasource":"@ASSOCIATED .PropertyName"}'. Replace PropertyName with the actual property name including dot prefix.

PicklistField.description: Associated dropdown / picklist field (Dropdown component). Requires all six datasource wiring fields. The associated property must have pyIsAssociation=true, pyTableOption='PromptList', and Rule-Obj-FieldValue rules defining the allowed values. Also update pxContextMetadata.$associated in the same call.

pyComponentName.description: Must be exactly 'Dropdown' (capital D, lowercase remainder).

pyJsonConfig.description: JSON-encoded string: '{"datasource":"@ASSOCIATED .PropertyName"}'. Replace PropertyName with the actual property name including dot prefix.

pyPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text shown when no value is selected.

DataReferenceField.description: Data Reference template-view field (reference component). Use this pattern for Infinity 24/25 compatibility and when embedding a DataReference template view. The embedded view rule name must be listed in pxContextMetadata.$views. pyJsonConfig is a JSON-encoded string (not an inline object).

pyTargetProperty.description: Name of the Page property WITHOUT dot prefix (e.g., 'LeaveCategory').

pyJsonConfig.description: JSON-encoded string with embedded view configuration: '{"authorContext":".PropertyName","name":"ViewRuleName","referenceType":"Data","ruleClass":"ContextClass","type":"view"}'.

pyRequiredValue.description: Send as boolean on CREATE/UPDATE. The server normalizes to string ('false'/'true') on GET.

ObjectReferenceDataReferenceField.description: Infinity 26+ only: ObjectReference Data Reference field. Not available in Infinity 24 or Infinity 25. Uses direct data page binding with pyDataSource/target object fields instead of a DataReference template view.

pyTargetProperty.description: Name of the Page property WITHOUT dot prefix (e.g., 'LeaveCategory').

pyTargetObjectClass.description: Data class selected by the ObjectReference component.

pyValueWithoutAnnotation.description: Stored key property path without @P annotation.

pyDisplayField.description: Data-class field displayed after selection, e.g. '.LeaveCategory.ApprovalRequired'.

pyDataSource.description: Data page name used as the lookup source, e.g. 'D_LeaveCategoryList'.

pyMode.description: Single-select ObjectReference mode observed in Infinity 26 XML.

pyReferenceComponentType.description: ObjectReference UI component variant observed in Infinity 26 XML.

EmbeddedDataMultiField.description: Infinity 26+ only: EmbeddedDataMulti PageList table inside a DefaultForm. Not available in Infinity 24 or Infinity 25. Uses a PageList property, pyPrimaryFields columns, and pxContextMetadata.$pagelists actions/views wiring.

pyTargetProperty.description: Name of the PageList property WITHOUT dot prefix.

pyTargetObjectClass.description: Data class for rows in the embedded PageList.

pyPagelistValue.description: PageList property path with dot prefix, e.g. '.Timesheets'.

pyAddEditAction.description: FlowAction used for add/edit rows, commonly 'pyEdit'.

pyTargetClassLabel.description: Singular display label for row objects.

pyColumns.description: Column definitions. Infinity 26 XML shows a Pega-UI-Content-Reference column to pyPrimaryFields.

UserReferenceField.description: Operator lookup field (UserReference component). Requires pyJsonConfig with referenceList.

pyPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text shown in the lookup input.

GenericFieldEntry.description: Fallback schema for field entry types not covered by the specific defs above (e.g., AutoComplete, RadioButtons, RichText). Set pxObjClass and pyComponentName correctly per the Field Type Patterns table.

ViewMetadata.description: Internal structure of the pxViewMetadata JSON string (documented here for reference — the top-level pxViewMetadata property must be sent as a JSON-stringified string, not an object). The top-level object represents the View node. Must mirror the pyContent structure exactly — each field in pyContent must have a corresponding entry in the children array at the same index.

name.description: View rule name — same as pyRuleName.

children.description: Top-level Region nodes — one per ContentRegion in pyContent.

ViewRootConfig.description: Config object at the View root level of pxViewMetadata.

template.description: Constellation template name — same as pyTemplateName.

localeReference.description: Locale reference key. Pattern: '@LR CLASSNAME!VIEW!RULENAME' — class dots become hyphens, both segments uppercased. Example: class 'MyCo-MyApp-Work-Case', rule 'CollectInfo' → '@LR MYCO-MYAPP-WORK-CASE!VIEW!COLLECTINFO'. Optional in CREATE/UPDATE payloads; may be server-generated.

NumCols.description: Column count for the view layout. Default '2' for DefaultForm views. Maps to pyColumnCount rule-level field.

inheritParentLayout.description: Whether to inherit layout from parent view. Default false. Maps to pyInheritParentLayout rule-level field.

instructions.description: Paragraph instruction binding, e.g., '@PARAGRAPH ParagraphRuleName'. Required when pyInstructionsOption is 'overridden'.

label.description: View label binding, e.g., '@L Custom Label'. Uses @L annotation for localized literal text.

ComponentNode.description: A single component node in the pxViewMetadata tree. Regions wrap fields; field nodes have no children. Index ordering must match pyContent exactly — use empty objects ({}) as placeholders for existing entries when building update payloads.

type.description: Component type: 'Region' for layout regions, or the DX component name for fields (e.g., 'TextInput', 'Date', 'Dropdown', 'TextArea', 'Checkbox', 'reference', 'DateTime', 'Decimal', 'UserReference').

name.description: Logical name — required for Region nodes (e.g., 'Fields'), optional for field nodes.

children.description: Child nodes — present on Region and View nodes, absent on field nodes.

ComponentConfig.description: Component-specific configuration inside a pxViewMetadata node. Common properties are listed; additional properties vary by component type.

label.description: Display label: '@FL .PropName' for field labels, '@L Label Text' for literal localized text.

required.description: True if the field is required. Must be paired with pyRequiredOption: 'always' in pyContent.

readOnly.description: True if the field is read-only.

disabled.description: True if the field is disabled.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text as a localized string (e.g., '@L Select...').

datasource.description: Data source binding. String for Dropdown fields (e.g., '@ASSOCIATED .PropertyName'). Object for widget datasources (e.g., {source, fields}).

deferDatasource.description: True to defer datasource loading. Required for Dropdown fields.

listType.description: List type — 'associated' for Dropdown fields, 'datapage' for DataReference AutoComplete/TableSelect.

captionOption.description: Caption label source for Checkbox fields.

trueLabel.description: Localized label for true state (e.g., '@L Yes').

falseLabel.description: Localized label for false state (e.g., '@L No').

hideLabel.description: True to hide the outer row label on Checkbox fields.

authorContext.description: Data Reference: property path for the embedded page (e.g., '.LeaveCategory').

name.description: Data Reference: embedded view rule name.

referenceType.description: Data Reference: 'Data' for data types, 'Case' for case types / LDM entities.

ruleClass.description: Data Reference: class context for the embedded view.

inheritedProps.description: Data Reference: inherited property overrides passed to the embedded view.

allowCreatingRecords.description: Infinity 26+ ObjectReference: true if users may create related records from the picker. Observed false.

componentType.description: Infinity 26+ ObjectReference: picker component variant. Combobox observed in Infinity 26 XML.

contextPage.description: Infinity 26+ ObjectReference: selected object page binding, e.g. '@P .LeaveCategory'.

displayField.description: Infinity 26+ ObjectReference: display field binding, e.g. '@P .LeaveCategory.ApprovalRequired'.

hideFieldLabels.description: Infinity 26+ ObjectReference: whether field labels are hidden in the picker.

mode.description: ObjectReference or DataReference selection mode. ObjectReference single mode observed in Infinity 26 XML.

referenceList.description: Data page or property reference supplying selectable rows, e.g. 'D_LeaveCategoryList'.

targetObjectClass.description: Infinity 26+ ObjectReference: target data class for selected objects.

targetObjectType.description: Infinity 26+ ObjectReference: target object type. 'data' observed.

addEditAction.description: Infinity 26+ EmbeddedDataMulti: FlowAction used to add/edit rows, e.g. 'pyEdit'.

columns.description: Column definitions for table-like components. EmbeddedDataMulti uses reference columns such as pyPrimaryFields.

displayAs.description: EmbeddedDataMulti display mode. 'table' observed in Infinity 26 XML.

targetClassLabel.description: EmbeddedDataMulti row object label, e.g. '@L Timesheet'.

ContextMetadata.description: Internal structure of the pxContextMetadata JSON string (documented here for reference — the top-level pxContextMetadata property must be sent as a JSON-stringified string, not an object). Lists all properties, embedded views, and associated datasources used by the view. Must be updated alongside pyContent in the same call.

$properties.description: Property paths referenced by this view, each with dot prefix (e.g., '.StartDate'). Include every property shown in pyContent.

$fields.description: Field references — one entry per property in $properties, same order.

$views.description: Embedded view rules referenced by Data Reference fields. One entry per unique embedded view.

ruleClass.description: Class context of the embedded view (e.g., 'MyCo-MyApp-Work-Case').

context.description: Page path for the embedded view context (e.g., '.LeaveCategory', '.PartyDock.PartyData'). Matches the authorContext/context value in pyJsonConfig.

$associated.description: Associated datasource entries for Dropdown fields. One entry per Dropdown field. REQUIRED for dropdowns — omitting causes the dropdown to render without options.

$insights.description: Insight widgets referenced by this view (usually empty).

$AIAgents.description: AI agent names referenced by this view (e.g., 'pzInsightAgent').

$pagelists.description: PageList and data page dependencies. EmbeddedDataMulti entries may include $actions, $views, pagelist, $fields, and includePrimaryFields.

$whens.description: When rule names referenced for conditional visibility/required logic. Simple string for scalar fields; object with nested $views for conditionally-visible embedded data.

oneOf.description: Simple When rule name for scalar field visibility.
When rule with nested sub-view dependencies for conditionally-visible embedded data.

$views.description: Sub-views that are conditionally shown by this When rule. These do NOT appear in top-level $views.

$paragraphs.description: Paragraph rule references (e.g., for instructions). Each entry uses the shape {"name": "ParagraphRuleName"}.

PageAndClass.description: A named page declaration for this view.
